description_long: This is a portable AM/FM radio receiver with a rectangular black plastic body and a sturdy carrying handle spanning the top. The front face features a large speaker grille on the left and a frequency tuning panel on the right, which includes a red-highlighted tuning scale, labeled frequency bands, and a few control knobs. An extendable metal antenna is mounted on the top right corner, allowing for improved radio signal reception. The back side has ventilation grilles, battery compartment access, and two power input sockets. The overall design is utilitarian, with clear labeling in white and red, and the words 'SUPER RÁDIO PORTÁTIL' prominently displayed on the front panel.
description: A black portable AM/FM radio with a large speaker grille, tuning panel, carrying handle, and extendable antenna.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker grille, tuning panel with frequency scale, control knobs, and brand labeling.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the radio and the protruding handle, with the antenna visible at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying ventilation grilles, battery compartment, and power input sockets.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the handle and antenna base.
